	<!-- Requirements: Next.js with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, SSR, Context API for state management, E-commerce for selling clothes -->

- [ ] Scaffold the Project
	<!-- Run create-next-app with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS configuration -->

	<!-- Set up basic folder structure for e-commerce: components, contexts, types, pages, api routes -->

	<!-- Check if any VS Code extensions are needed -->

	<!-- Install dependencies and verify build -->

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	<!-- Create dev server task for Next.js -->

- [ ] Launch the Project
	<!-- Start Next.js development server -->

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	<!-- Update README with project setup and architecture details -->

## Project Details
- **Framework**: Next.js with TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **State Management**: React Context API
- **Purpose**: E-commerce application for selling clothes
- **Rendering**: Server-Side Rendering (SSR)
